title: urtica heterophylla
intro: Urtica heterophylla, also known as the nettle-leaved stinging nettle, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Urtica heterophylla include relieving symptoms of arthritis, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its therapeutic properties.
